description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the htfy96/cpp-suite:latest Docker image and runs a global before_script executing git submodule update --init --recursive. Define a single test stage with a job named test that creates a build directory, runs cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug .., builds the project with make VERBOSE=1, and runs ctest -G 'soci_.*' --output-on-failure to execute matching tests and show failures. The test job runs in the test stage with no additional caches, artifacts, or rules.
